description_long: This crustacean object features a robust, segmented body with a pronounced cephalothorax and a slightly tapered abdomen. Its surface is glossy and smooth, with a gradient of warm yellow, tan, and cream hues. The head region is dominated by a large, bulbous structure with a downward-facing snout and a dense cluster of appendages or tendrils beneath, resembling mouthparts or sensory organs. The object has four prominent limbs, two of which are larger and positioned forward, possibly representing claws, while the other two extend backward, mimicking walking legs. The back is adorned with several short, spiny projections or antennae-like structures. The overall form is stylized, with exaggerated anatomical features and a shiny, almost plastic-like finish.
description: A glossy, stylized crustacean with a bulbous head, prominent mouthparts, and four robust limbs in warm yellow and tan tones.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bulbous head, dense mouthparts, and two large forward limbs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the segmented body, backward-extending limbs, and spiny projections on the back.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the symmetrical arrangement of limbs and the cluster of spiny projections at the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the limb articulation and the detailed head structure.
